g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I compare multiple classifiers using cross-validation in scikit-learn?')
sendPrompt('How do I select the best model and export it with joblib?')
sendPrompt('How do I serialize a scikit-learn pipeline with joblib?')
sendPrompt('What exactly does joblib save — preprocessor and model together?')
g.text: Saved: scaler + encoder + trained model weights

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I structure a FastAPI project for ML model serving?')
sendPrompt('How does Pydantic input validation work in FastAPI?')
sendPrompt('How do I write a /predict endpoint in FastAPI that loads a joblib model?')
sendPrompt('Show me what a full request-response cycle looks like in the FastAPI prediction endpoint')
g.text: JSON in → Pydantic validates → model.predict() → label + probabilities out
Handle errors: 422 Unprocessable Entity on bad input, 500 on model failure

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Should I build the frontend with plain HTML/JS or a framework like React?')
sendPrompt('How do I call the FastAPI /predict endpoint from JavaScript using fetch?')
sendPrompt('How do I display the prediction result and risk level in the UI?')
sendPrompt('Why do I need CORS in FastAPI and how do I configure it?')
sendPrompt('What UX details should the student risk prediction interface show?')
g.text: Loading state, error messages, label colours

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I serve the HTML frontend directly from FastAPI using StaticFiles?')
g.text: Option: serve frontend from FastAPI via StaticFiles — one server, no separate hosting needed

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I test the full prediction pipeline from form input to displayed result?')
sendPrompt('What edge cases should I test in the student risk predictor?')
sendPrompt('Can I deploy the FastAPI app to a free cloud platform like Railway or Render?')
sendPrompt('Summarise what I learned across the entire student performance project')
g.text: Project complete — full ML pipeline from raw data to live web prediction
